blurb_en:
"Weird Al" Yankovic says he turned down "a nice pile of money" to appear in an AI software commercial, discovering the AI angle a week before the scheduled shoot.
• The deal was pitched as a business productivity tool — he did not connect the dots until nearly too late.
• His response: "Oh no, I can't be the poster boy for AI, forget it."
• He says he "felt bad" about backing out so close to production day — which is more than the AI company is getting from him.
• Yankovic is also specifically opposed to AI generating parody songs, a hill he has earned the right to die on.
• For brands building AI campaigns, understanding which creators are firm red lines is now active creative strategy.
• The poster boy position remains unfilled.
blurb_zh:
以怪异著称的音乐人"怪人阿尔"扬科维奇拒绝了一笔可观的出场费，在距广告拍摄一周前退出合同，原因是发现这是一款AI产品的商业广告。
• 对方最初将其包装为普通商业软件代言——他差点没发现。
• "我不能成为AI的代言人，算了吧，"他在巡演前接受采访时说。
• 他承认退出得很晚，感到有些过意不去——这已经是AI公司能从他这里得到的最多了。
• 他同样反对AI生成改编歌曲——对一个靠改编起家的音乐人来说，这个立场理所当然。
• 代言人位置目前仍悬空。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety, Deadline, Digital Music News, Rolling Stone, AV Club — all citing Yankovic's Syracuse.com interview ahead of Bigger & Weirder tour

blurb_en:
President Donald Trump posted a roughly 90-second AI-generated video on Truth Social late Wednesday in which he appears as "Dr. Trump," presenting pharmaceutical-style fake testimonials from AI likenesses of Rosie O'Donnell, Whoopi Goldberg, Robert De Niro, Julia Roberts, and Edward Norton — all depicted as suffering from "Trump Derangement Syndrome."
• Treatment plan per Dr. Trump: "Turn off fake news, say your prayers and if you ever feel anxious, just have a Diet Coke like me."
• "Trump Derangement Syndrome" is not a recognized medical condition. The video does not clarify this.
• The President of the United States generating AI fake likenesses of private citizens to mock them politically was not a sentence that made sense two years ago.
• This is a direct application of the AI deepfake threat that the industry has spent years warning about, now live in the wild.
• The Diet Coke, at least, is real.
blurb_zh:
美国总统特朗普于周三深夜在Truth Social发布了一段约90秒的AI视频，视频中他扮演"特朗普医生"，为罗茜·奥唐纳、乌比·戈德堡、罗伯特·德尼罗、朱莉娅·罗伯茨和爱德华·诺顿的AI生成形象诊断"特朗普失调症"。
• 视频以药品广告风格呈现名人"患者证言"。
• 特朗普医生的处方：关掉假新闻、做祷告、"像我一样喝健怡可乐"。
• "特朗普失调症"并非真实医学诊断——视频中未作说明。
• 这是AI深度伪造在现实政治攻防中的直接应用，几年前还停留在警告层面，如今已成现实。
• 健怡可乐是真的。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety, Deadline, Mediaite, Hollywood Reporter, New Republic — all citing Truth Social post from late July 2, 2026

blurb_en:
At an internal town hall Thursday, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg told employees that AI agent development "hasn't really accelerated in the way that we expected" over the past four months.
• Meta laid off approximately 8,000 employees in February and reassigned 7,000 others to new AI teams — including a unit called "Agent Transformation."
• Zuckerberg acknowledged the restructuring was "not as clean" as it could have been and that executives miscalculated on timing.
• He added that he expects "more significant benefits" within the next three to six months.
• Meta has pledged $60 billion in AI-driven revenue by 2027, which makes this admission the kind of thing you hope stays in the room.
• Developers building for Meta's AI platform now have vaguer timelines than they did last week.
• Three to six months, always three to six months.
blurb_zh:
在周四的内部员工大会上，Meta首席执行官马克·扎克伯格向员工承认，过去四个月间AI代理的研发进展"并未如预期加速"。
• Meta早前裁员约8000人，并将另外7000名员工重新分配至AI团队，其中包括名为"代理转型"的部门。
• 扎克伯格同时承认本轮重组"不够顺畅"，管理层在时机上出现了判断偏差。
• 他表示预计未来三到六个月将出现"更显著的收益"。
• Meta承诺到2027年实现600亿美元AI收入——这句话在这个语境下听起来更像期望，不像计划。
• 三到六个月，总是三到六个月之后的事。
verification_notes: Reuters exclusive, confirmed via US News, Business Standard, Mediaite, ZeroHedge; TechCrunch also covered (paywalled)

blurb_en:
Blackstone-backed Jersey Mike's Subs filed for a $12 billion NYSE IPO Thursday, and the S-1 prospectus contains the words "artificial intelligence" or "AI" exactly 22 times.
• The chain operates 3,256 locations and is known for slicing cold cuts to order — its connection to AI is not immediately obvious.
• The filing says the company is "beginning to use AI Technologies" without specifying what those are.
• AI appears in the risk factors section, where companies must disclose even speculative threats to investors — making AI both an asset and a liability in the same document.
• Annual system sales reached $4.3 billion last year, up 13% — which is the actual story.
• For companies using AI in genuinely demonstrable ways, the inevitable backlash against this kind of prospectus padding is worth watching.
• The cold cuts remain unautomated.
blurb_zh:
全美三明治连锁Jersey Mike's于周四向纽交所递交IPO申请，目标估值约120亿美元，背后有黑石集团支持；招股书中共出现"人工智能"或"AI"字样22次。
• 该品牌拥有3256家门店，核心业务是现切冷熟肉三明治——与AI的关联目前尚不明朗。
• 招股书仅表示公司"正开始使用AI技术"，未披露任何具体应用场景。
• AI出现在"风险因素"章节——对他们来说，AI既是商机也是威胁，两者写在了同一份文件里。
• 去年公司系统销售额达43亿美元，同比增长13%——这才是真正的故事。
• 现切冷熟肉暂无自动化计划。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNBC, Bloomberg, Eastern Herald, Restaurant Dive; TechCrunch editorial on AI hype angle also confirmed via BLK Alerts

blurb_en:
Midjourney filed a motion this week asking a federal judge to compel Disney, Universal, and Warner Bros. to disclose their internal use of AI in the copyright lawsuit brought against the image generator.
• The studios sued Midjourney for enabling massive infringement of their copyrighted characters; Midjourney argues the studios do the same thing.
• A magistrate judge in June limited discovery to the studios' "consumer-facing" AI applications; Midjourney wants more — training data, model weights, board presentations.
• The legal argument: you cannot sue us for AI training if you are doing AI training.
• "Unclean hands" is the formal legal doctrine in play, and it sounds considerably more polite than what Midjourney is actually arguing.
• How this ruling goes will shape IP boundaries between content owners and AI tools throughout the imaging and creative industries.
• The studios' lawyers have presumably also used AI to draft parts of their brief.
blurb_zh:
在迪士尼、环球、华纳兄弟因版权纠纷起诉Midjourney的案件中，该AI图像公司本周向法院提交动议，要求三大制片厂披露其内部使用AI的详情。
• Midjourney的辩护逻辑：你们自己也在用AI训练模型，没资格告我。
• 此前法官已将制片厂披露范围限定为"面向消费者"的AI应用；Midjourney上诉，要求获取训练数据、模型权重和董事会文件。
• 法律术语"不洁之手"（unclean hands）是核心论点——即对方在道德上无资格提起诉讼。
• 此案裁决将在很大程度上决定内容版权方与AI工具公司之间的权益划分方式。
• 制片厂律师起草诉状时，大概也用了AI。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety, ComicBasics, AV Club, Let's Data Science — motion filed in Disney/Universal/Warner v. Midjourney federal copyright case

blurb_en:
At the Aspen Ideas Festival this week, Jodie Foster told a panel that Brad Pitt's racing blockbuster F1 "was made by AI" — not as a literal claim, but because its script follows conventional screenplay structure so precisely it could have been written by a machine.
• "The actors say the lines exactly the way it would be written if a computer was writing exactly what would be the right thing for that time," Foster said.
• She prefaced this by saying she was not being critical: F1 made hundreds of millions of dollars and won an Oscar for Best Sound.
• The screenwriters were Oscar-nominated human Ehren Kruger and director Joseph Kosinski; producers included Jerry Bruckheimer and Lewis Hamilton.
• Foster's point: AI's most convincing tell is not broken fingers. It is narrative competence without surprise.
• The F1 team has not responded.
blurb_zh:
在本周的阿斯彭创意节上，演员朱迪·福斯特在一场讨论中表示，布拉德·皮特主演的赛车大片《F1》"感觉像是用AI写出来的"——并非字面指控，而是因为影片结构完全遵循教科书式的剧本模板。
• "演员念台词的方式，就像是AI在为那个时刻写最标准的内容，"她说。
• 她声明自己并无批评之意——该片票房亮眼，并获奥斯卡最佳音效奖。
• 编剧是奥斯卡提名得主埃伦·克鲁格和导演科辛斯基本人，制作人阵容包括杰里·布鲁克海默和刘易斯·汉密顿。
• 福斯特的观点：AI内容最大的识别特征，不是技术瑕疵，而是"可预测的完美"。
• 《F1》剧组暂未回应。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety, Deadline, Hollywood Reporter, The Wrap, World of Reel — Aspen Ideas Festival panel

blurb_en:
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has proposed giving a 5% equity stake in the company — worth approximately $42.6 billion at its current valuation — to a US sovereign wealth fund modeled on the Alaska Permanent Fund, according to the Financial Times and CNBC.
• The proposal was raised directly with President Trump, Commerce Secretary Lutnick, Treasury Secretary Bessent, and Senator Bernie Sanders.
• The stated goal: "secure good relations with the administration" and "address political blowback."
• Other AI companies would be asked to donate similar stakes under the plan; none have confirmed agreement.
• The talks remain preliminary and would likely require congressional approval to formalize.
• OpenAI is actively preparing for an IPO. Giving away $42 billion before pricing is unusual, to put it gently.
• The Alaska Permanent Fund was built on oil revenues. OpenAI is proposing to build it on everyone else's words.
blurb_zh:
据英国《金融时报》及CNBC报道，OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼已提议将公司约5%股权——按现有估值约合426亿美元——捐赠给一个仿照阿拉斯加永久基金设立的美国主权财富基金。
• 奥特曼已就该提案与特朗普总统、商务部长卢特尼克、财政部长贝森特及参议员伯尼·桑德斯进行沟通。
• 明确目的："巩固与现政府的关系"并"化解政治阻力"。
• 其他AI公司也将被邀请捐出类似股权，目前尚无一家表示同意。
• 谈判仍处于早期阶段，正式落地可能需要国会批准。
• OpenAI正在准备IPO上市；在定价前主动出让426亿美元股权，实属罕见。
• 阿拉斯加永久基金靠的是石油收入；OpenAI打算用其他所有人的文字来填充它。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNBC, Forbes, Android Headlines, Crypto Briefing — originating from FT report; TechCrunch also covered (paywalled)

blurb_en:
Google and Amazon released sustainability reports Wednesday showing carbon emissions jumped sharply in 2025 — Google's by 25%, Amazon's by 16% — with AI infrastructure expansion cited as the primary driver.
• Amazon emitted nearly 80.9 million metric tons of CO2-equivalent in 2025, more than the entire nation of New Zealand.
• Amazon added more data center capacity globally in 2025 than any other company, including over 1.2 gigawatts in Q4 alone.
• Both companies have pledged net zero by end of decade. Both are currently moving in the opposite direction.
• The growth is largely Scope 3 — GPUs, steel, cement, and data center construction — not just operational power.
• The pledges remain on the websites.
blurb_zh:
谷歌与亚马逊于周三相继发布可持续发展报告：两家公司2025年碳排放均显著上升，谷歌增幅25%，亚马逊16%，AI基础设施扩张被列为主要原因。
• 亚马逊全年碳排放接近8090万公吨二氧化碳当量，超过新西兰全国年排放总量。
• 2025年，亚马逊新增数据中心容量超过任何一家企业，仅第四季度即新增逾1.2吉瓦算力。
• 两家公司均承诺在本十年末实现净零排放——目前双双背道而驰。
• 排放增量主要来自范围三（Scope 3）：GPU、钢铁、水泥及数据中心建设等上游碳排。
• 承诺书还留在官网上。
verification_notes: Confirmed via GeekWire (Amazon), Insurance Journal, Technology.org (Google + Amazon) — sourced from published annual sustainability reports

blurb_en:
Angel Studios released historical epic "Young Washington" in theaters Thursday, with director Jon Erwin confirming approximately 100 shots were augmented using AI platforms including Luma, Amazon's Project Nara, and Magnific.
• Erwin co-founded Innovative Dreams — a joint venture with Luma AI — specifically to develop AI-assisted film production workflows.
• The AI was used for establishing shots, cannon-fire effects, and turning two production employees into British soldiers in period-accurate uniforms on horseback.
• His stated principle: do everything practically possible first, then use AI to amplify it.
• The production required five dedicated AI artists plus a separate AI producer to manage the multi-platform pipeline.
• The film premiered at Tribeca in June and targets a $20 million opening weekend.
• A 100-shot AI pipeline across three platforms in a theatrical release is now the benchmark, not the exception.
blurb_zh:
Angel Studios于周四上映历史史诗片《青年华盛顿》，导演乔恩·欧文确认，全片约有100个镜头使用了AI工具辅助制作，平台涵盖Luma、亚马逊的Project Nara以及Magnific。
• 欧文同时参与联合创立了AI电影制作公司Innovative Dreams，由其旗下Wonder Project与Luma AI共同组建。
• AI被用于远景建立镜头、炮击场景，以及将两名制作人员变身为着历史服装、骑马的英军士兵。
• 导演理念：能实拍的都实拍，用AI来放大愿景。
• 片场专门配备了五名AI艺术师和一名AI制作人，负责协调多平台工作流程。
• 影片于6月在翠贝卡电影节首映，首周末票房目标2000万美元。
• 100个AI镜头、三个AI平台、一部院线大片——不再是实验，而是新常态。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety and World of Reel — Angel Studios release July 3, Tribeca premiere June 13, 100-shot AI pipeline confirmed by director
